meaning: 津德尔[尼日尔南部城市]
examples: 976 cases including 62 deaths (CFR 6.4%) have been reported in Diffa, Maradi, Tahoua and Zinder regions between 3 July and 1 October.
Primary schools in the southern Zinder region are now closing, as families abandon the area and head toward the capital in search of food.
